mainWindowFunction.zh: 自然语言问诊；患者只回答被问到的信息。
mainWindowFunction.en: Natural-language patient interview; the patient answers only what is asked.

keyRule: Never return full history or teacher-only hints.

mainWindowFunction.zh: 查体、检验、影像、内镜、病理及围术期评估；开了什么才返回什么。
mainWindowFunction.en: Physical exam, laboratory tests, imaging, endoscopy, pathology and perioperative workup; return results only after orders.

mainWindowFunction.zh: 提交最可能诊断、诊断依据和鉴别诊断。
mainWindowFunction.en: Learner submits most likely diagnosis, evidence and differential diagnoses.

keyRule: Check true hematuria, internal vs surgical hematuria, red flags.

mainWindowFunction.zh: 判断会诊时机、科室、会诊目的并整合MDT意见。
mainWindowFunction.en: Determine consultation timing, departments, consultation purpose and integrated MDT opinion.

mainWindowFunction.zh: 对照指南/RAG路径评价治疗方案一致性与差异。
mainWindowFunction.en: Compare learner plan with EAU/CUA/AUA/CSCO/RAG pathway; explain agreement and deviations after submission.

keyRule: Feedback after submission only; do not give answer early.

mainWindowFunction.zh: 术前优化、ERAS、抗栓、感染控制、备血、VTE及并发症预防。
mainWindowFunction.en: Preoperative optimization, ERAS, anticoagulation, infection control, transfusion, VTE and complication prevention.

keyRule: Separate perioperative stage, not mixed with treatment.

mainWindowFunction.zh: 生成时间线、分数、能力画像、漏项、危险错误和学习建议。
mainWindowFunction.en: Generate timeline, scores, competency profile, missed items, unsafe errors and learning suggestions.

keyRule: OSCE mode: feedback only after completion.
